_readme: Source of truth for docs/Illustration_UL/Testing/TEST_MATRIX.xlsx.
Regenerate the workbook with:  venv\Scripts\python.exe tools/build_test_matrix.py
HOW TO ADD A TEST CASE:
1. Add the case to the RERUN workbook's Saved Cases sheet (or capture a
constructed override scenario) and run the comparison
(tools/compare_rerun_vs_app.py) -> put the detail workbook in Testing/details/.
2. Append a row object to 'rows' below. Fields:
company / policy / form / db_option - identity (list_local_policies.py has these)
description     - what kind of policy this is (product, age, class, riders, benefits)
forecast_inputs - the forecast the case defines (premium pattern, WD/loans, changes, IUL settings)
status          - PASS | FAIL | PARTIAL | PENDING (see status_vocabulary)
comments        - cite the evidence: detail workbook filename and/or the documented record
glp_gsp / contributions / distributions / policy_debt / eav / esv - per-quantity result:
'EXACT'  - zero delta vs RERUN within tolerance, evidenced
<number> - max absolute delta observed (rendered as 'D <n>' with amber fill)
'FAIL'   - material unexplained mismatch
'-'      - not applicable or not yet compared
3. Rerun the build script. Never edit TEST_MATRIX.xlsx by hand - it is generated.
Statuses must be honest: do NOT claim EXACT without a retained artifact in
Testing/details/ or a documented record (QUESTION_LOG.md, WORK_LAPTOP_SPEC.md,
the Saved Case description) cited in the comments.

status_vocabulary.PASS: All compared quantities match RERUN within tolerance; evidence cited in Comments.
status_vocabulary.PARTIAL: Core quantities verified; named residuals remain, each classified in Comments.
status_vocabulary.FAIL: Material unexplained mismatch, or the case is unrunnable as stored.
status_vocabulary.PENDING: Not yet compared, or comparison artifact not retained on this machine.

rows.forecast_inputs: Level $150/mo; IUL blend 20% each U1(fixed)/IS/IX/IC/IF.
rows.comments: FAIL as stored in RERUN itself: pre-fix offline build (2026-07-16) with a blank PW benefit code - every CalcEngine month returns #N/A (confirmed in details/rerun_vs_app_iul_blend_20260718: all deltas are Excel error values). Superseded by Case 9, the same-day fixed rebuild. Not an engine defect.

rows.description: Saved Case 9 - IUL (1U145500), issue age 40, NS, issue 2017 (AG49 index 2); PW benefit (39) + ABR. Fixed rebuild of Case 7.
rows.forecast_inputs: Level $150/mo; IUL blended crediting, allocations 20% each U1(fixed 2.5%)/IS/IX/IC/IF; also run under WAIR crediting and constructed IP-allocation / variable-loan variants.
rows.comments: 2026-07-18 comparison (details/rerun_vs_app_iul_blend_* and _wair_*): IUL crediting VERIFIED - blended rate exact 900 mo, AG49 regime, asset charge (SU exact, SV bit-identical mo 1), WAIR (VI exact; VJ within 9e-5), variable-loan spread exact. Band-boundary bug FIXED same day (issue-date-dependent band 3 start per Rates_Control CZ: Rates.get_band now takes issue_date + BandTable2IssueDate from the plancode table; re-run details/rerun_vs_app_iul_blend_bandfix_20260718_200353.xlsx - COI/NAR band deltas gone, COI exact through mo 528, first delta 0.013 knock-on at mo 529). Residual AV drift 998.24 classified: known PoAV-charge gate bug (poav_code=='Table' check, Fee ~-8/mo) plus PW-cease and MTP-mapping divergences where the engine matches the admin system, not RERUN (WORK_LAPTOP_SPEC par. 5.5).

rows.description: Saved Case 12 - IUL (1U147500), issue age 25, Preferred+ NS, issue 2022 (AG49A index 3 - asset charge correctly zero); PWST (4#), GIR (78) + ABR benefits; face $600,000.

Residual AV drift classified: PoAV-charge engine bug (WORK_LAPTOP_SPEC par. 5.5b) + MTP-mapping divergence (engine carries full system MTP, RERUN Debug AI is MTP-without-PW). PWST/GIR charge deltas (-0.25/mo early, -60/mo late) UNCLASSIFIED until 1U147500 benefit rates are exported (laptop). GIR-era guideline values pending same export.

rows.comments: Validated EXACT vs RERUN 2026-06-10: 0.0 delta over 90 months (QUESTION_LOG.md par. G). First scenario where the 7702 premium-cap machinery actually binds. Detail workbook to be regenerated.

rows.comments: Validated EXACT vs RERUN 2026-06-10: 0.0 delta over 90 months after the premium-load re-band fix (QUESTION_LOG.md par. G, engine bug #1). Detail workbook to be regenerated.

rows.comments: Validated EXACT vs RERUN 2026-06-10: 0.0 delta over 90 months (QUESTION_LOG.md par. G). Detail workbook to be regenerated.

rows.forecast_inputs: Level $153.56/mo; WD $1,000 at the year-11 anniversary + DBO A->B at year 16. Full withdrawal stage: max-net, PSC on net allocation, gross face decrease, cost-basis and WD-to-date tracking.
rows.comments: Validated EXACT vs RERUN 2026-06-10: all groups incl. the new Withdrawals group at 0.0 delta over 120 months; exposed + fixed the 7-pay re-solve benefit gating (QUESTION_LOG.md par. H). Detail workbook to be regenerated.
